Stop.command:
bash -c '
DIR="myinsights"
INDEX="myinsights/1nsights.md"
CLAUDE="CLAUDE.md"

if [ -d "$DIR" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git diff --name-only --cached -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then
  if ! grep -q "myinsights" "$CLAUDE" 2>/dev/null; then
    printf "\n## Development Insights\nIndex: [myinsights/1nsights.md](myinsights/1nsights.md) — check here FIRST before debugging.\n" >> "$CLAUDE"
    git add "$CLAUDE"
    echo "myinsights/ reference added to CLAUDE.md"
  fi
  git add "$DIR"
  git commit -m "docs(insights): update knowledge base"
  echo "myinsights/ auto-committed"
fi
'

bash -c '
ROADMAP=".claude/feature-roadmap.json"

if [ -f "$ROADMAP" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$ROADMAP" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git diff --name-only --cached -- "$ROADMAP" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then
  git add "$ROADMAP"
  git commit -m "chore: update feature roadmap"
  echo "feature-roadmap.json auto-committed"
fi
'

bash -c '
PLANS_DIR="docs/plans"

if [ -d "$PLANS_DIR" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$PLANS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git diff --name-only --cached -- "$PLANS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$PLANS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then
  git add "$PLANS_DIR"
  git commit -m "docs(plans): save implementation plans"
  echo "docs/plans/ auto-committed"
fi
'
